name: WF01 - Intake Web App Manual Upload
WF06 - Publish Batch To Web App API

parameters.query: SELECT si.period_key,COALESCE(si.channel,so.channel) AS channel,COALESCE(si.branch_code,so.branch_code) AS branch_code,COALESCE(si.sku_code,so.sku_code) AS sku_code,SUM(COALESCE(si.qty_sell_in,0))::numeric AS total_in,SUM(COALESCE(so.qty_sell_out,0))::numeric AS total_out FROM sell_in_record si FULL OUTER JOIN sell_out_record so ON si.period_key=so.period_key AND si.channel=so.channel AND si.branch_code=so.branch_code AND si.sku_code=so.sku_code GROUP BY 1,2,3,4;

SELECT payment_id,invoice_id,due_date,invoice_amount,paid_amount,payment_status,CURRENT_DATE-due_date AS overdue_days,to_char(CURRENT_DATE,'YYYY-MM') AS period_key FROM payment_record WHERE payment_status IN ('unpaid','partial','overdue') AND due_date<CURRENT_DATE;

UPDATE payment_record SET payment_status='overdue',aging_bucket=CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE-due_date<=30 THEN '0_30' WHEN CURRENT_DATE-due_date<=45 THEN '31_45' WHEN CURRENT_DATE-due_date<=60 THEN '46_60' ELSE '61_plus' END,aging_days=CURRENT_DATE-invoice_date WHERE payment_id='{{ $json.paymentId }}';

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { periodKey: $json.periodKey, riskType: $json.riskType, severity: $json.severity, entityType: $json.entityType, entityKey: $json.entityKey, metricName: $json.metricName, observedValue: $json.observedValue, thresholdValue: $json.thresholdValue, status: $json.status, ownerRole: $json.ownerRole } }}
={{ { ...$json, sourceWorkflow: 'WF08', fallbackSummary: `Invoice ${$json.entityKey} telah melewati due date selama ${$json.observedValue} hari.` } }}
={{ { messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $json.to, type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.messageBody } } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, recipient: $('Route Recipient And Fallback').first().json.waRecipient, summary: $('Compose WhatsApp Payload').first().json.messageBody, providerResponse: $json } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const i=$input.first().json;
return[{json:{original:i,openAiRequest:{model:$env.OPENAI_MODEL_SUMMARY||'gpt-4.1-mini',input:[{role:'system',content:[{type:'input_text',text:'Ringkas alert operasional dalam bahasa Indonesia formal. Maksimal dua kalimat. Jangan mengubah angka, severity, entity, atau threshold.'}]},{role:'user',content:[{type:'input_text',text:JSON.stringify({severity:i.severity,riskType:i.riskType,entityType:i.entityType,entityKey:i.entityKey,metricName:i.metricName,observedValue:i.observedValue,thresholdValue:i.thresholdValue,ownerRole:i.ownerRole,periodKey:i.periodKey})}]}],text:{format:{type:'json_schema',name:'koprindo_ai_summary',schema:{type:'object',additionalProperties:false,properties:{summary:{type:'string'}},required:['summary']},strict:true}}}}}]
